metadata.project_name: Gamified Portfolio for Shailendra Sunil Rana

project.goal: Create a highly unique, deeply gamified personal portfolio website for Shailendra Sunil Rana, using React.js and static site principles, optimized for GitHub Pages hosting.
project.vision: A futuristic yet classic RPG/MMO HUD (Heads-Up Display) aesthetic that presents the developer's career, skills, and projects as an interactive game-like experience.

identity.name: Shailendra Sunil Rana
identity.biography: Leveraging comprehensive full-stack skills and deep ServiceNow expertise to construct robust, performant systems. A problem-solver dedicated to code excellence and innovative solutions.

core_abilities.name: C#/.NET
core_abilities.description: Advanced mastery of enterprise application development using C# and .NET frameworks. Expert in building scalable, high-performance backend systems.

core_abilities.name: SQL & DB Management
core_abilities.description: Expert database architecture, optimization, and management. Proficient in designing complex queries, indexing strategies, and database performance tuning.

specializations.name: ServiceNow Development
specializations.description: Grandmaster-level expertise in ServiceNow platform development. Deep specialist knowledge built through 5+ years of dedicated platform experience across multiple modules.

passive_buffs.name: Data Structures & Algorithms
passive_buffs.description: Advanced understanding of fundamental computer science concepts including data structures, algorithm design, and complexity analysis.

unlocked_features.name: AI Prompt Engineering
unlocked_features.description: Emerging capability in AI-powered development workflows. Exploring and implementing AI-assisted coding, prompt optimization, and LLM integration.

components.main_menu: Styled like inventory or character selection screen
components.skill_tree: Branching visualization like RPG skill trees

user_responses.google_form_integration: Use form link directly from Google Drive folder

avatar_generation.detailed_prompt:
Transform the provided raw image into a futuristic RPG character portrait in the following style:

- Character Design: Cyberpunk/sci-fi warrior with system architect aesthetic
- Setting: Digital realm/virtual environment with holographic elements
- Visual Elements:
  * Neon accents (cyan, purple, electric blue)
  * Glowing aura or energy effects
  * Tech-forward armor or clothing
  * Commanding presence befitting a 'System Architect-Knight'
- Art Style: Modern AAA game character (high-fidelity, rendered quality, professional yet fantastical)
- Output Format: Portrait format suitable for circular profile frame (1:1 aspect ratio, 512x512px minimum)
- Maintain: Recognizable facial features from original image
- Tone: Professional yet fantastical; serious yet approachable
- References: Character portraits from games like Diablo 4, League of Legends, World of Warcraft

styling_guidelines.prompt:
Design a gamified portfolio website UI in the style of a futuristic RPG/MMO HUD.

Color Palette:
- Primary: Deep purples (#1a0033, #330066)
- Accent: Neon cyan (#00d9ff), Electric purple (#9d4edd)
- Secondary: Gold (#f7b801), Muted grays (#2d3748)
- Text: Light gray (#e2e8f0), White (#ffffff)

Key Design Principles:
1. HUD Aesthetic: Futuristic interface inspired by sci-fi games
2. Glass Morphism: Semi-transparent panels with backdrop blur
3. Neon Glows: Border glows and shadows in accent colors
4. Responsive: Works seamlessly on mobile, tablet, desktop
5. Micro-interactions: Smooth hover effects, click feedback, animations
design_system_components: Cards with neon borders and shadows
Skill tree nodes with unlock animations

content_generation.about_section: Generate a professional yet gaming-styled bio using the stakeholder identity context
content_generation.skill_descriptions: Create engaging RPG-style descriptions for each skill based on level and type
content_generation.project_descriptions: Draft sample project descriptions for the artifact gallery (to be replaced with actual projects)
content_generation.timeline_entries: Create formatted timeline entries for education and professional experience
content_generation.achievement_text: Write achievement/badge descriptions for skill unlocks

phases.name: Project Setup & Foundation
tasks: Install core dependencies (Framer Motion, Tailwind, Zustand, Lucide)
Set up vite.config.ts for GitHub Pages deployment

phases.name: Design System & Core Components
tasks: Implement RPG color palette in Tailwind
Create reusable UI components (Button, Card, GlassPanel, Badge)
Build App Shell with Header, Navigation, Footer

phases.name: Gamified Content Components
tasks: Build Skill Tree component with branching visualization
Create Project Gallery with artifact cards
Implement Experience Timeline with scroll triggers

phases.name: Interactive Features
tasks: Integrate Google Form from Drive folder

phases.name: Avatar & Polish
tasks: Add avatar animations and hover effects

phases.name: Deployment & Testing
tasks: Create GitHub Actions workflow for deployment

deliverables: ✓ Tailwind CSS with custom RPG theme
✓ Contact form with Google Form integration

components.common: Reusable UI components (Button, Card, Badge, etc.)
components.ui: Smaller UI primitives and building blocks

src.styles: Global Tailwind overrides and custom styles

typography.code: Font Family: Courier New or Monospace

functionality: All pages render correctly and are navigable
Skill tree displays and interactions work smoothly
Contact form submits to Google Form successfully
design: RPG aesthetic consistent across all pages
No layout shifts or visual glitches
responsiveness: All text is readable, buttons are tappable
accessibility: Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
deployment: GitHub Actions workflow succeeds on push
All assets load from correct paths

notes.security: Static site with zero backend exposure - perfectly safe for GitHub Pages hosting.
notes.scalability: Data-driven approach makes it easy to add more projects, skills, or timeline entries.
notes.maintainability: Modular component structure and TypeScript typing ensure long-term code quality.
notes.performance: Vite's bundling and code splitting optimize initial load and runtime performance.
notes.deployment: GitHub Actions automates the entire deployment process - push to main, site updates automatically.
notes.avatar: Placeholder ready for AI-generated version once image is created and integrated.
